arabic: وَعَن ابنِ عبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: يُلَبِّي المقيمُ أَوِ المعتَمِرُ حَتَّى يستلمَ الْحَجَرَ) . رَوَاهُ أَبُو دَاوُدَ وَقَالَ: وَرُوِيَ مَوْقُوفًا على ابنِ عبَّاس.

english.text:
Those who stay in Mecca and those who perform the ’umra  raise their voices in the talbiya till they touch the stone.

Abu Dawud transmitted it, saying it has been transmitted going no farther back than Ibn ‘Abbas.
